title: Auxmir 30X Magnifying Mirror with Tweezers, Double Sided 30X/1X Magnifying Makeup Mirror with Stand, 360° Rotation Bathroom Vanity Mirrors for Shaving, Dressing Table, Desktop, Bedroom, 6.8 Inch
features: 🔍𝟏𝐗/𝟑𝟎𝐗 𝐌𝐀𝐆𝐍𝐈𝐅𝐘𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐌𝐈𝐑𝐑𝐎𝐑-The Auxmir double-sided makeup mirror features a common mirror and a powerful 30X magnifying mirror, providing clear details for beauty applications like shaving and makeup.

🔁𝟑𝟔𝟎° 𝐒𝐖𝐈𝐕𝐄𝐋 𝐌𝐈𝐑𝐑𝐎𝐑-The 360° swivel joint enables smooth switching between 1X and 30X magnification, providing exceptional detail. You can adjust the magnifying mirror to any desired angle for optimal viewing.

💄𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐓 𝐓𝐖𝐄𝐄𝐙𝐄𝐑𝐒-The precision tweezers included in the package are made of stainless steel, making them resistant to wear and corrosion. This makes them perfect for trimming away unwanted whiskers, eyelashes, and eyebrow hairs.

🧳𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐓𝐎 𝐀𝐒𝐒𝐄𝐌𝐁𝐋𝐄-The Auxmir 30X magnifying cosmetic mirror is travel-friendly with a detachable base and lightweight design. It is easy to install and disassemble. Fits conveniently into a carry-on suitcase, saving valuable space and making travel more convenient.

❤️𝐊𝐈𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐘 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄-When using the 30X magnification side, hold the mirror 3-5 inches away from your eyes at first. If the image is distorted, adjust the distance between your face and the mirror until you get a clear reflection.

✨𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐔𝐌 𝐐𝐔𝐀𝐋𝐈𝐓𝐘-The Auxmir magnifying mirror is crafted from high-quality ABS material, crystal-clear glass, and a high-gloss polished chrome finish, ensuring a scratch-resistant surface and durability. Ideal for makeup application, shaving, or skincare routines.
💪𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄-𝐁𝐀𝐒𝐄 𝐌𝐈𝐑𝐑𝐎𝐑-The 30X magnifying mirror with stand is designed to be stable and stay firmly in place. It won't easily tip over even when rotated to find the perfect angle.

✨𝐄𝐋𝐄𝐆𝐀𝐍𝐓 𝐌𝐀𝐊𝐄𝐔𝐏 𝐌𝐈𝐑𝐑𝐎𝐑-This 30X magnifying tabletop makeup mirror features a gorgeous glossy finish and looks incredibly elegant. Its transparent design makes it a wonderful addition to the decor of any office, bathroom, or bedroom.
